theme_notes: Today's touchstones: the US-Iran war (Strait of Hormuz blockade, Iran seizing ships, oil at record highs, Senate war powers vote 46-51 against restraint) and Pete Hegseth firing Navy Secretary Phelan over the 'Golden Fleet' warship program. Also: the Detroit Pistons' historic worst-to-first NBA run as the East's #1 seed, a proposed $500M Spirit Airlines federal bailout, and the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire extended three weeks from the White House.
settled: Basically a ceasefire. Unlike Iran's, this one might actually hold.
You're balanced. Pete Hegseth wishes his relationships looked this clean.
Detroit went 60-22. You went broke-to-balanced. Equally improbable. Respect.
youOwe: Less than Iran charges per ship at the Strait of Hormuz. Still embarrassing.
Spirit Airlines needed $500M to keep flying. You need way less. Still not paying.
Hegseth fired the Navy Secretary over pace. Slowness is your dominant trait.
That's one tank of gas now that Iran owns the Strait of Hormuz. Pay it.
Detroit went 60-22 this season. Your payment record is the inverse.
Trump said 'don't rush me' about a war. Your partner is done waiting.
Iran seized two ships for leverage. You haven't seized the moment to pay.
Senate voted 46-51 to keep the war going. Nobody's voting for your side.
That's Hegseth's Golden Fleet. One small, humiliated, apologetic dinghy.
Trump hosted Israel-Lebanon talks at the White House. This is also a summit. Pay.
The Lebanon ceasefire got a three-week extension. This debt will not.
You've turned your Venmo into the Strait of Hormuz. Nothing gets through.
Iran earns $20M a day from Hormuz tolls. You generate this. In debt. Annually.
Detroit Pistons had the NBA's biggest turnaround ever. Yours is the biggest collapse.
Spirit Airlines is getting a federal bailout and still has better financials than you.
The Strait of Hormuz is blockaded. Your goodwill is blockaded. Everything is blockaded.
You've triggered the debt equivalent of a war powers resolution. The vote is not close.
Iran seized international cargo ships. Your partner has seized the apartment. Fair.
theyOwe: Iran charges ships to pass through the Strait. Charge your partner to pass the blame.
Less than a barrel of crisis-priced oil. Still yours. Still owed.
The Lebanon ceasefire is shakier than this amount. Collect anyway.
Trump is negotiating with Iran. Negotiate nothing. Just collect.
The Pistons clawed from worst to first. Claw this back.
Republicans have $850M for the midterms. You have this owed to you. Don't forgive it.
The US blockaded an entire strait. You can blockade one deadbeat.
Trump has no timeline for ending the war. Give them one. Make it today.
Spirit Airlines got a federal intervention. Stage your own.
Oil is at record highs. So is the audacity of this sitting here unpaid.
That's the Golden Fleet budget, Hegseth-style. Launch the naval operation.
Spirit Airlines got offered $500M with no questions asked. Start asking questions.
Iran earns $20M daily from the Strait. This is one day's tribute. Collect it.
Hegseth fired a Navy Secretary for foot-dragging. Draft your ultimatum now.
Detroit rebuilt from 22 wins to 60. Rebuild your patience into a legal position.
The Strait of Hormuz is blockaded. Block everything. Nothing moves until this is paid.
You are the geopolitical crisis now. Someone should negotiate on your behalf.
This isn't a balance. It's a war powers resolution. And you have all 51 votes.
